summary: OBE: ISS-1852 description claims WIN-021 IAU citation URL points to https://www.iau.org/ (homepage), but spot-check of current data/wins.json:["021"].detail_evidence shows the URL is in fact https://www.iau.org/static/resolutions/IAU2006_Resol1.pdf — the IAU 2006 Resolution B1 deep link the issue requested as preferred fix. URL was corrected by some prior unattributed patch cycle and the tracker entry (EXP-327) was left stale. Close with fixed_by=OBE-already-corrected-by-prior-patch.
